texto: If there is one thing I can promise, that I can guarantee, it is not that I can protect my other allies from the same fate as Sage, it is not that I will not lose battles in the war, it is not that there will be times that will try my determination, it is this: I am the Pauraque’s rival. And I shall be the one to watch her fall.
explicacao: Citação de Hannah E. O'Neal sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “If there is one thing I can promise, that I can guarantee, it is not that I can protect my other …” articula tempo, allies, battles em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como battles e fall.
